criteria.name: Personalization
criteria.description: The degree to which the app provides personalized product recommendations, search results, and overall shopping experiences based on user data (browsing history, purchase history, preferences, demographics).
criteria.sources: Multiple sources, user reviews, app descriptions

criteria.name: AI-Powered Search & Discovery
criteria.description: The effectiveness of AI in understanding natural language queries, image-based searches, and voice searches to deliver relevant and accurate results.

criteria.name: Customer Support
criteria.description: The availability and quality of AI-powered chatbots or virtual assistants for instant customer support, answering questions, and guiding users through the purchasing process.

criteria.name: Price Comparison & Deal Finding
criteria.description: The app's ability to compare prices across different retailers, locate deals and discounts, and predict price fluctuations to help users save money.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, expert reviews, user reviews

criteria.name: User Experience (UX)
criteria.description: The overall intuitiveness, ease of navigation, and visual appeal of the app's interface, contributing to a seamless and enjoyable shopping experience.

criteria.name: AR/VR Integration
criteria.description: The extent to which the app utilizes augmented reality (AR) or virtual reality (VR) technologies to enhance the shopping experience, such as virtual try-on features.
